inputs.label: Nightly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average price per night charged to guests

businessContext_i18n.en: Average price per night charged to guests
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Preis pro Nacht, der Gästen berechnet wird

inputs.label: Occupancy Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of available nights that are booked

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of available nights that are booked
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der verfügbaren Nächte, die gebucht sind

inputs.label: Nights Available per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total nights the property is available for booking per month

businessContext_i18n.en: Total nights the property is available for booking per month
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün aylık rezervasyona açık olduğu toplam gece sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Nächte, in denen die Unterkunft pro Monat buchbar ist

inputs.label: Average Length of Stay
inputs.businessContext: Average duration of a guest's stay in nights

businessContext_i18n.en: Average duration of a guest's stay in nights
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir misafirin konaklamasının gece cinsinden ortalama süresi
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Dauer des Aufenthalts eines Gastes in Nächten

inputs.label: Cleaning Fee per Booking
inputs.businessContext: Fee charged per guest booking for cleaning

businessContext_i18n.en: Fee charged per guest booking for cleaning
businessContext_i18n.tr: Misafir başına temizlik için alınan ücret

inputs.label: Airbnb Service Fee
inputs.businessContext: Host service fee percentage charged by Airbnb on each booking

businessContext_i18n.en: Host service fee percentage charged by Airbnb on each booking
businessContext_i18n.tr: Airbnb'nin her rezervasyonda aldığı ev sahibi hizmet ücreti yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gastgeber-Servicegebühr, die Airbnb pro Buchung berechnet

inputs.label: Monthly Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total monthly costs including mortgage/rent, utilities, maintenance, insurance, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monthly costs including mortgage/rent, utilities, maintenance, insurance, etc.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İpotek/kira, elektrik, su, bakım, sigorta vb. dahil toplam aylık maliyetler
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Gesamtkosten inkl. Hypothek/Miete, Nebenkosten, Wartung, Versicherung usw.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
